nasb.text: The people who were camped heard it said, “Zimri has conspired and has also struck down the king.” Therefore all Israel made Omri, the commander of the army, king over Israel that day in the camp.

esv.text: and the troops who were encamped heard it said, “Zimri has conspired, and he has killed the king.” Therefore all Israel made Omri, the commander of the army, king over Israel that day in the camp.

cnv.text: 正在安營的眾人聽說：“心利已經密謀背叛，又擊殺了王。”於是以色列眾人在那一天，就在營中立了軍長暗利作以色列王。

ccb.text: 他们听说心利谋反弑君，就在当天拥立军中元帅暗利做以色列王。
